---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a feature for Kungfu.js
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?

A clear description of what the problem is. e.g. "I'm frustrated when [...]"

## Proposed solution

A clear description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional context

Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.

## Willingness to contribute

- [ ] I'm willing to open a PR for this
- [ ] I'd like to discuss the design first
- [ ] I'm just suggesting — someone else should implement
